subject: [PATCH v2 2/3] testing: add nfsd-io-bench NFS server benchmark suite

2026-04-08.patch_summary: This patch adds a new benchmark suite, nfsd-io-bench, to test the performance of NFSD I/O modes using fio and libnfs against an NFS server on localhost. The suite includes various workloads such as sequential and random read/write, multi-writer, noisy-neighbor, and latency-sensitive reader tests. It also includes scripts for setting up the NFS export, running the benchmarks, and parsing the results from fio's JSON output. This patch aims to provide a comprehensive testing framework for NFSD I/O performance.
